Project: doku landing page
Description: High-contrast landing page for doku, a private, local-first document vault (encrypt, classify, and manage records on-device).
Stack: Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Radix Accordion, React Compare Slider.
Primary Message: "Your life isn't a file system."
Audience: People struggling with document sprawl in DigiLocker and Google Drive.
